objective: Build a technical analysis engine for object-level trend, momentum, drawdown repair, volatility, and liquidity evidence.
forbidden: Do not use forward return labels.
Do not tune thresholds on the sample outcome.
acceptance_criteria: One latest technical row per object.
Latest rows match the V3.87 research object contract.
Volatility context is structured as risk/confidence evidence.
Formula components and weights are reproducible.
failure_conditions: V3.87 universe and V3.88 latest rows do not match.
Unbounded or NaN latest score for usable objects.
Volatility is claimed but not present in structured output.
quality_gates: Directional formula weights sum to one.
Input contract check has no fail rows.
